caption: A man with dark skin wears a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" printed on the front. He is seated in a room that looks like a clothing store or studio, with a white mannequin and clothing racks visible in the background, along with several framed pictures on the wall. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. On-screen text includes "CALAMAR WHITE" and a red and white logo that reads "REALLY REAL TALK". As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his facial expressions and posture; he begins with a neutral look, moves to a slight smile while gesturing with his left hand, breaks into a wide grin, and finally looks down with a smile. The camera angle remains steady throughout the clip.
